title: Workdays formula to work with multilevel sub-item board
excerpt:
Description
Formula does not work in Formula column to calculate number of workdays in multilevel sub-item boards. 
WORKDAYS({Planned Timeline#End}, {Planned Timeline#Start})

Calculate the…

posts.author: tjaarto (Tjaart)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Formula does not work in Formula column to calculate number of workdays in multilevel sub-item boards.
WORKDAYS({Planned Timeline#End}, {Planned Timeline#Start})

What are you trying to achieve

Calculate the number of worksdays (excluding weekends) in a multilevel sub-item board.

posts.author: sanmart (sanmart)
posts.cookedHtml: The WORKDAYS() formula doesn’t currently work in multilevel sub-item boards, even though it works on main items.
